description: Landing page polish, accessibility improvements, SEO meta tags per page, and overall production-readiness enhancements. Improve the landing page with better animations, add proper ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, and meta tags throughout the application.
steps: 1. Improve src/components/landing/HeroSection.tsx: Add entrance animations (elements fade in sequentially), add proper aria-labels to interactive elements, improve the hero dashboard mockup with a subtle float animation.
2. Improve src/components/landing/FeaturesSection.tsx: Add scroll-triggered reveal animations using Intersection Observer (elements animate in as user scrolls). Add aria-labels.
3. Improve src/components/landing/PricingSection.tsx: Add hover animations on plan cards, add aria-labels, improve the popular plan highlight.
4. Improve src/components/landing/CTASection.tsx and src/components/landing/Footer.tsx: Add entrance animations, improve footer layout with proper semantic HTML (nav, address elements).

5. Add SEO metadata: Create proper generateMetadata exports in key pages - src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx (or its layout), src/app/[locale]/(public)/menu/[slug]/page.tsx, src/app/[locale]/(public)/reserve/[slug]/page.tsx. Add Open Graph tags and descriptive titles.

6. Accessibility pass: Add aria-labels to all icon-only buttons in Sidebar, DashboardHeader, product action buttons. Add role attributes to navigation. Ensure proper heading hierarchy (h1 > h2 > h3). Add sr-only labels for screen readers on status badges.
7. Improve src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx: Add mobile menu support (hamburger on mobile), smooth scroll to sections, active section highlighting.
acceptance_criteria: Landing page elements animate on scroll/load
Public pages have descriptive meta titles
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit in /projects/sandbox/YUMYLAND to verify TypeScript compiles
Review that animations use CSS or Intersection Observer (no additional libraries needed)
findings: All changes compile successfully. Pre-existing ~2355 TypeScript errors remain from missing node_modules (documented in FEAT-001). No new errors introduced by these changes. Used IntersectionObserver for scroll-reveal animations and CSS keyframes for staggered entrance animations. All animations use only existing CSS infrastructure (extended globals.css). Added comprehensive aria-labels, aria-expanded, aria-current, and role attributes across landing, dashboard, and layout components.
